entities.name: CensusProfile
entities.description: Demographic and socioeconomic snapshot for Canadian cities from the 2021 Census, including population, age distribution, household size, income, and dwelling statistics.

entities.name: CrimeIncident
entities.description: Individual crime incidents reported across Canadian cities, including crime type, category, offence, neighbourhood, location coordinates, and occurrence date.

entities.name: HousePriceIndex
entities.description: Monthly Teranet house price index values for Canadian cities, tracking home price trends including seasonally adjusted values, month-over-month changes, and price level indicators.

entities.name: Permit
entities.description: Building and construction permits issued across Canadian cities, covering permit type, structure type, work type, address, estimated construction cost, dwelling units, and key milestone dates.

entities.name: StrongMayorDecision
entities.description: Formal decisions issued by mayors under Ontario's strong mayor powers across 92 municipalities, including decision type, title, summary, and associated PDF documents.

entities.name: TransitStop
entities.description: Transit stops across Canadian cities and agencies (e.g. STM, TTC), including stop name, code, geographic coordinates, accessibility (wheelchair boarding), location type, and parent station groupings.

entities.name: RentalMarket
entities.description: CMHC rental market data by city, zone, and bedroom type, capturing average and median rents, vacancy rates, rent changes, and total rental unit counts on an annual basis.

entities.name: StrongMayorMunicipality
entities.description: Reference registry of Ontario municipalities designated under the strong mayor framework, including designation wave, effective date, implementation status, and data ingestion progress tracking.

entities.name: ServiceRequest
entities.description: Municipal service requests submitted by residents across Canadian cities, including request type, department, neighbourhood, submission channel, status, and open/close dates.

entities.name: TorontoMayoralDecision
entities.description: Mayoral decisions issued by the Mayor of Toronto, including decision type, title, summary, PDF source documents, and publication dates — covering committee structures, appointments, bylaw approvals, and more.
